# ZephyrDevs - Full Documentation Context
> Comprehensive aggregated information regarding ZephyrDevs capabilities, services, subscriptions, and team rosters for Large Language Models (LLMs).

---

## 1. Introduction & Brand Philosophy
ZephyrDevs is a premium design and development agency. We build fast, responsive, and intelligence-driven web applications. We avoid standard templates and instead focus on bespoke dark-mode layouts, vibrant neon color accents, custom animations, and seamless AI agent integrations.

### Stack Specializations:
- **Languages**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript
- **Backend & Cloud**: Node.js, Express, Firebase Firestore & Realtime Database, Serverless functions
- **AI Models**: Google Gemini API, Anthropic Claude API, Custom Prompts & RAG Pipelines

---

## 2. Core Service Areas

### 01 / Bespoke Frontend Development
We construct responsive, accessible, and animation-rich user interfaces. Prioritizing pure performance, we write lean HTML5, modern CSS with smooth grids, and responsive vanilla JS layouts.
- Mobile-First Responsive Frameworks
- Mac-Styled & Glassmorphic Dashboards
- Performance Optimization (SEO & Web Vitals)
- Vanilla JS Scroll Reveals & Micro-animations

### 02 / Backend Architecture & APIs
Need a robust logic layer for your product? We build high-throughput backend server routes and deploy serverless functions, handling user sessions, secure authentications, and data syncing.
- Node.js API Development & Deployment
- Firebase Realtime Database & Firestore Sync
- Firebase User Authentication & Authorization
- Scalable Serverless Cloud Infrastructure

### 03 / AI & LLM Systems Integration
Inject intelligence directly into your app. We wire your systems with large language models, enabling context-aware chat, smart file analysis, auto-summarization, and semantic search.
- Google Gemini API Pipeline Setup
- Anthropic Claude Intelligent Agents
- Custom Prompt Engineering & Pipelines
- Vector Search & Context Retrieval

### 04 / Interactive Design Systems
A great product starts with a consistent visual language. We design full style components, interactive prototypes, and design systems featuring custom shadows, cursors, and layouts.
- Sleek Dark Mode and Neon Accents
- Top Nav Pill Active Tracking Indicator Menus
- Custom SVG Brand Assets & Graphics
- UI Component Library & Style Tokens

---

## 3. Workflow & Delivery Process

### 01 / DISCOVER (Briefing & Wireframes)
Mapping out page flows, visual guidelines, database nodes, and custom style specifications.

### 02 / DESIGN (Interactive Mockups)
Creating glassmorphic CSS layouts, custom typography scales, and responsive templates.

### 03 / BUILD (Frontend & Backend)
Writing fast, pure HTML5/JS files, coding Node backend routes, and configuring Firebase databases.

### 04 / LAUNCH (Audit & Deploy)
Auditing animation timings, optimizing SEO, and launching pages to global servers.

---

## 4. Subscription Pricing Plans & Matrix

ZephyrDevs operates on a flat-rate annual subscription model rather than complex, fluctuating quotations. GST invoices are provided, all intellectual property belongs to the client, and code is committed to client repositories from day one.

### 4.1 Subscription Plans
1. **Starter Plan** (₹1,999 / year)
   - *Target*: Personal hobbies, open-source ideas, portfolio templates.
   - *Deliverable*: 1-2 Responsive HTML/CSS pages, sleek minimalist design, hosting deployment configuration, XML sitemap integration, basic SEO optimization.
2. **Pro Plan** (₹2,999 / year)
   - *Target*: Startups and professional projects requiring database routes and Gemini AI forms.
   - *Deliverable*: Up to 5 fully responsive pages, Node.js REST API routes, Firebase Storage & Auth setups, Google Gemini smart forms connection, XML sitemap & Pro SEO optimization, llms.txt context index, 3 months developer warranty support.
3. **Enterprise Plan** (₹4,999 / year)
   - *Target*: High-throughput database systems, dual-LLM systems, and custom workflows.
   - *Deliverable*: Unlimited pages & custom systems, high-performance Node API + Express, Firebase Firestore realtime sync, Google Gemini & Claude Dual-LLM configurations, sitemap & advanced enterprise SEO, llms.txt & llms-full.txt context documents, security audit, page load optimization, 24/7 VIP Priority support access.

### 4.2 Detailed Comparison Matrix

| Feature | Starter (₹1,999/yr) | Pro (₹2,999/yr) | Enterprise (₹4,999/yr) |
|---|---|---|---|
| **HTML/CSS Pages** | 1-2 Pages | Up to 5 Pages | Unlimited Pages |
| **Animations** | Custom reveals | Custom reveals | Full UI/WebGL system |
| **Backend Integration** | None | Standard Firebase/API | High-throughput realtime sync |
| **Google Gemini AI** | None | Basic forms & chats | Advanced prompts & pipelines |
| **Anthropic Claude AI** | None | None | Full multi-agent architectures |
| **Sitemap & SEO** | Basic Setup | Pro SEO & Sitemap | Enterprise SEO & Custom Schema |
| **AI Context (llms.txt)** | None | llms.txt index | llms.txt & llms-full.txt |
| **Support SLAs** | Community Discord | Email (12hr SLA) | 24/7 VIP Priority Channel |

---

## 5. Project Planner & Budgets (contact.html)
For custom quotes, clients can select estimated budgets via our slider:
- **Starter Subscription** (₹1,999/year)
- **Pro Subscription** (₹2,999/year)
- **Enterprise Subscription** (₹4,999/year)
- **Custom App + Node Backend** (₹40,000 - ₹1,50,000 one-time)
- **Enterprise dual-LLM Systems** (₹3,00,000 - ₹5,00,000+ one-time)

---

## 6. Team & Roster
ZephyrDevs is driven by three co-founders:
1. **Akshansh Sinha** (Co-Founder & Backend Dev) - Focuses on Node.js, Express, databases, and server configurations.
2. **Aarav Sharma** (Co-Founder & Creative UI) - Focuses on design systems, CSS details, WebGL shaders, and smooth animation systems.
3. **Arshh** (Co-Founder & Lead AI Engineer) - Focuses on Google Gemini pipeline engineering, Anthropic Claude integrations, and agent design.
